hero.desc:
Built for scale. High-precision AST extraction, built-in Privacy Shield,
driving internationalization from 'Search' to 'Evolution'.

scanner.title: PRECISION EXTRACTION
scanner.desc: Deep context parsing via Tree-sitter AST. Accurately identifies UI attributes while automatically filtering library paths and data noise.

privacy.title: PRIVACY DECONTAMINATION
privacy.desc: Built-in Privacy Shield automatically intercepts sensitive data. API Keys and PII are 100% masked before text leaves your local environment.

evolution.title: L3 TRUTH SECURED
evolution.desc: Manual Commit confirms final translation. All items are locked into <1>L3 Approved State</1>, ensuring immutable consistency and robust evolution.
